text.title: Capacity Fit Calculator Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Capacity Fit Calculator.

example.scenario: Solo founder + 1 contractor, last 4 sprints velocity 22/26/24/24 (median 24), focus 0.75, 1 day PTO (4 points). Available = 24×0.75 − 4 = 14. Proposed 16 points → cut-required; move 1 story (3 pts) to next sprint.
